notes: MISS cohort 2014 (29518 Swedish women, 20-year follow-up): avoiding sun exposure is a risk factor for all-cause mortality — mortality inversely related to sun exposure habits
MISS cohort 2016 competing risk analysis: sun avoidance carries similar mortality risk as smoking in non-smokers; CVD and non-cancer mortality significantly higher in sun avoiders
PMC 2016 review: UV radiation is significant and modifiable melanoma risk factor; intermittent high-intensity exposure and sunburns are primary drivers (not chronic moderate exposure)
